entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0195.10625] us-gaap:StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodShares has a value of 72 and has been used with the common stock member on the StatementEquityComponentsAxis. This element should not have a value when used with the common stock Member as us-gaap:StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodShares should not impact common stock.
The Statement of Changes in Equity implies there is no treasury stock as the opening balance of shares uses a shares issued concept. The element StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodShares that was used implies that the repurchased shares were added to treasury stock. If the roll-forward of shares is based on shares issued the element StockRepurchasedAndRetiredDuringPeriodShares should be used instead of StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodShares. Alternatively change the opening balance share element to SharesOutstanding. The opening balance of shares issued is presumed based on the following fact(s) : 5,273,611 using the SharesIssued or CommonStockSharesIssued with the StatementEquityComponentsAxis and CommonStockMember. Please check that you meant to tag this fact with SharesIssued or CommonStockSharesIssued
The properties of this us-gaap:StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodShares fact are: Period :2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis=us-gaap:CommonStockMember Unit : shares Rule Element Id:10625 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - formposam.htm 23491

[DQC.US.0195.10625] us-gaap:StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodShares has a value of 21 and has been used with the common stock member on the StatementEquityComponentsAxis. This element should not have a value when used with the common stock Member as us-gaap:StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodShares should not impact common stock.
The Statement of Changes in Equity implies there is no treasury stock as the opening balance of shares uses a shares issued concept. The element StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodShares that was used implies that the repurchased shares were added to treasury stock. If the roll-forward of shares is based on shares issued the element StockRepurchasedAndRetiredDuringPeriodShares should be used instead of StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodShares. Alternatively change the opening balance share element to SharesOutstanding. The opening balance of shares issued is presumed based on the following fact(s) : 5,273,611 using the SharesIssued or CommonStockSharesIssued with the StatementEquityComponentsAxis and CommonStockMember. Please check that you meant to tag this fact with SharesIssued or CommonStockSharesIssued
The properties of this us-gaap:StockRepurchasedDuringPeriodShares fact are: Period :2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis=us-gaap:CommonStockMember Unit : shares Rule Element Id:10625 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - formposam.htm 23412
